underlying_goal: Review and fix UI issues across multiple PRs, address code review comments, fix CI test failures, and push changes
friction_detail: Claude's first two attempts at fixing the button sizing were wrong (flex-1 made button too big, then icon size increase didn't look right) before matching the home page's grid pattern.
brief_summary: User needed UI fixes on PR buttons, code review comment responses (specs + JSX cleanup + deduplication), and a CI test fix across two PRs — all were completed and pushed after some initial iteration on the button layout.
